title: Frontend: Event History tab on issue detail
description:
As a user reading an issue, I want an Event History tab beside Comments, so that I can see the timeline of actions on that issue.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Issue detail view shows tabs: Comments (default) and Event History.
- Selecting Event History fetches events for the issue, ordered chronologically, showing type, actor, timestamp, and context (from→to for transitions; comment reference for comments).
- Supports pagination/load-more for long histories and an empty state when no events exist.
creator: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: Issue detail UI now has Comments + Event History tabs; events fetch on tab open, supports load more, and renders type/actor/timestamp summaries.
